User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the InvoiceFlow application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

nif.description: The user's NIF (Número de Identificación Fiscal).

logoURL.description: URL of the user's company logo stored in Firebase Storage.

firmaURL.description: URL of the user's signature image stored in Firebase Storage.

selloURL.description: URL of the user's company seal image stored in Firebase Storage.

registrationDate.description: The date and time the user registered.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice generated by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

concepts.description: An array of concepts included in the invoice.

subtotal.description: The subtotal amount of the invoice.

iva.description: The IVA (VAT) amount of the invoice.

total.description: The total amount of the invoice (including IVA).

date.description: The date the invoice was created.

pdfURL.description: URL of the generated PDF invoice stored in Firebase Storage.

Concept.title: Concept
Concept.description: Represents a concept within an invoice.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Concept entity.

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Each document is owned by the user with the matching userId.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores invoices created by each user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the invoice.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the invoice.

definition.description: Stores individual concepts associated with an invoice. Includes denormalized 'invoiceId' and 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the invoice.

params.name: invoiceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the invoice.

params.name: conceptId
params.description: The unique identifier of the concept.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure data isolation between users and to enable efficient querying and secure access. It uses path-based ownership for user-specific data (invoices, concepts) and enforces authorization independence by avoiding `get()` calls in security rules.

- `/users/{userId}`: Stores user profiles. This collection uses path-based ownership; each document is owned by the user with the matching `userId`.
- `/users/{userId}/invoices/{invoiceId}`: Stores invoices created by each user. The `userId` path segment ensures that each user can only access their invoices, enforcing data isolation. This structure facilitates secure and efficient querying of invoices for a specific user. In addition, the `userId` field is denormalized into the Invoice document to allow for Authorization Independence.
- `/users/{userId}/invoices/{invoiceId}/concepts/{conceptId}`: Stores individual concepts associated with an invoice. This nested structure allows for efficient retrieval of concepts related to a specific invoice. The `invoiceId` and `userId` are denormalized into each Concept document to enable authorization independence at the concept level.

This structure adheres to the principle of Authorization Independence by denormalizing the `userId` into the Invoice and Concept documents, eliminating the need for `get()` calls in security rules to verify ownership. This simplifies the rules and enables atomic operations.

It also provides QAPs, as list operations are secured by the path-based ownership.  A user can only list invoices under their own `/users/{userId}/invoices` path, and concepts under their own `/users/{userId}/invoices/{invoiceId}/concepts` path.
